description: Triggers at the start of any conversation or before any task to ensure relevant skills are loaded before responding
should_trigger: Which skills should I use for this task?
Before I start this project, what skills apply?
I'm about to implement a new feature, what should I check first?
Help me with my Next.js app - where do I begin?
I want to make sure I use the right approach for this
should_not_trigger: Write unit tests for my code
